model: 第七代 Robotaxi（北汽极狐 ARCFOX T5 / 广汽 AION V 第二代）
model_en: Pony.ai Gen-7 Robotaxi (ARCFOX T5 / GAC AION V)
function_name: L4 全无人 Robotaxi — 北京 / 上海 / 广州 / 深圳 四城商业化
function_name_en: L4 Fully-Driverless Robotaxi — BJ/SH/GZ/SZ Commercial Operations
software_version: 基于 NVIDIA DRIVE Orin 的第七代 ADS 系统，系统设计寿命 10 年 / 60 万公里
hardware_config: 4× NVIDIA Orin-X（总算力 1016 TOPS）+ 9× 激光雷达（含 4× 禾赛 AT128 主雷达）+ 14× 摄像头 + 4× 毫米波雷达（650 m 探测）+ 4× 麦克风 + 2× 涉水传感器

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 一线城市许可 + geofence + 全无人商业化服务
boundary_combinations.title_en: Tier-1 city permits + geofence + fully driverless commercial service
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 小马智行 Gen-7 全无人商业化服务由城市许可、运营区域、车辆平台和 App 服务共同构成边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully driverless commercial service is bounded jointly by city permits, service areas, vehicle platform, and app operations.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方 PDF 披露 Gen-7 在广州、深圳、北京启动全无人商业化运营，并称在北上广深四个一线城市运营全无人商业化 Robotaxi。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official PDF discloses Gen-7 fully driverless commercial operations in Guangzhou, Shenzhen, and Beijing, and states fully driverless Robotaxi service across all four tier-1 Chinese cities.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 小马智行的 L4 样例应按城市和运营区域理解，不应外推成全国能力。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Pony.ai’s L4 sample should be read by city and operating area, not generalized nationwide.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: L4 样例的第一边界应始终是许可城市 + geofence + 运营规则。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: The first L4 boundary should be city permit + geofence + operating rules.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

evidence_refs.title: 小马智行官网
evidence_refs.section: Robotaxi 服务城市、自动驾驶里程与复杂天气 / 路况长尾场景说明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 前海核心区域 + 近 2000 个乘车站点 + App 叫车
boundary_combinations.title_en: Qianhai core area + nearly 2,000 pickup points + app ride-hailing
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 服务可用性由前海核心区域、乘车站点密度、App 派单和停靠条件共同定义。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Service availability is jointly defined by the Qianhai core area, pickup-point density, app dispatch, and stopping conditions.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 前海管理局资料披露小马智行依托前海开放路段和近 2000 个乘车站点实现全无人商业化运营。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Qianhai government reporting states Pony.ai uses Qianhai open roads and nearly 2,000 pickup points for fully driverless commercial operations.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 对乘客而言，L4 ODC 直接体现为“哪些站点能叫到车”。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: For passengers, L4 ODC appears directly as which pickup points can be used.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 应把乘车站点作为服务 ODC 的运营要素，而不只是地图附属信息。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Pickup points should be treated as operational ODC elements, not just map metadata.

evidence_refs.title: 深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营
evidence_refs.section: 前海核心区域、近 2000 个乘车站点、复杂城市和天气能力表述

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 复杂天气能力表述 + 传感器配置 + 停运阈值未公开
boundary_combinations.title_en: Complex-weather capability statement + sensor suite + undisclosed suspension thresholds
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 官网与地方报道提到复杂天气和长尾场景能力，但未给出雨量、能见度、积水或风力阈值。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: The official site and local reporting mention complex weather and long-tail scenarios, but do not disclose rainfall, visibility, standing-water, or wind thresholds.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 小马智行官网称持续攻克复杂天气、路况导致的长尾场景；前海报道称可在复杂城市环境和各种天气下感知、预测和决策。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Pony.ai’s site states it continues tackling complex-weather / road long-tail scenarios; Qianhai reporting says the system can perceive, predict, and decide in complex urban environments and various weather conditions.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: “各种天气”不能直接转成量化 ODC。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: “Various weather conditions” cannot be directly converted into quantitative ODC.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这是公开资料最需要厂家补充量化阈值的地方。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A key area where vendor-confirmed quantitative thresholds are needed.

evidence_refs.title: 小马智行官网
evidence_refs.section: Robotaxi 服务城市、自动驾驶里程与复杂天气 / 路况长尾场景说明

evidence_refs.title: 深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营
evidence_refs.section: 前海核心区域、近 2000 个乘车站点、复杂城市和天气能力表述

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 车内无安全员 + 远程协助 / 最小风险策略阈值未披露
boundary_combinations.title_en: Uncrewed vehicle + undisclosed remote-assistance / minimal-risk thresholds
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 车内无安全员后，远程协助触发条件、MRM 触发策略和乘客沟通流程是 L4 ODC 的关键组合边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: After removing the in-vehicle safety driver, remote-assistance triggers, MRM strategy, and passenger communication flow become key L4 ODC boundaries.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方公开资料披露全无人商业化服务，但没有披露远程协助触发阈值或最小风险策略细节。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Public official sources disclose fully driverless commercial service, but not remote-assistance trigger thresholds or MRM details.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 全无人服务的可信度需要远程运营边界支撑。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: The credibility of fully driverless service depends on remote-operations boundary disclosure.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 适合与 ROAM 中远程运营异常类型建立关联。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Suitable for linking to remote-operation anomaly types in ROAM.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 复杂城市环境 + VRU + 各种天气
boundary_combinations.title_en: Complex urban environment + VRUs + various weather
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 复杂城市环境通常意味着 VRU、路口、临停车辆和天气因素同时存在；公开资料没有拆成可验证参数。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: A complex urban environment usually means VRUs, intersections, parked vehicles, and weather factors occur together; public sources do not decompose these into verifiable parameters.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 前海资料称小马智行 L4 系统能在复杂城市环境和各种天气条件下实现高精度感知、预测和决策。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Qianhai reporting states Pony.ai’s L4 system can achieve high-precision perception, prediction, and decision-making in complex urban environments and various weather conditions.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 这是一条能力表述，不是完整 ODC 表。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: This is a capability statement, not a complete ODC table.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 建议作为公开缺口：需要更多场景参数分层。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Should be marked as a public gap requiring layered scenario parameters.

evidence_refs.title: 深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营
evidence_refs.section: 前海核心区域、近 2000 个乘车站点、复杂城市和天气能力表述

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 多城运营 + 城市道路规则不可简单迁移
boundary_combinations.title_en: Multi-city operation + non-transferable local road rules
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 北上广深四城运营共享技术底座，但每个城市的路权、信号、停靠点和许可边界不同。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen may share a technology base, but right-of-way, signals, pickup rules, and permit boundaries differ by city.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官网披露服务城市，官方 PDF 披露四个一线城市全无人商业化服务；没有发布统一跨城 ODC。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official site discloses service cities and the official PDF discloses fully driverless commercial service in four tier-1 cities; no unified cross-city ODC is published.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 一个城市可用不代表另一个城市同样可用。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Availability in one city does not imply identical availability in another.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: OpenODC 样例应避免把多城规模化写成同一个无差别 ODC。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: OpenODC should avoid turning multi-city scale into a single undifferentiated ODC.

evidence_refs.title: 小马智行官网
evidence_refs.section: Robotaxi 服务城市、自动驾驶里程与复杂天气 / 路况长尾场景说明

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

boundary_combinations.title_zh: Gen-7 ADK 生命周期 + 车型平台 + ODC 阈值缺口
boundary_combinations.title_en: Gen-7 ADK lifecycle + vehicle platform + ODC threshold gap
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 600,000 公里产品生命周期和车规级 ADK 是可靠性信息，但不能直接说明道路、天气或目标物 ODC 阈值。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: A 600,000-km product lifecycle and automotive-grade ADK are reliability information, but they do not directly state road, weather, or object ODC thresholds.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: Gen-7 官方 PDF 披露车规级 ADK 和生命周期设计，但没有给出 ODC 参数。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The Gen-7 official PDF discloses an automotive-grade ADK and lifecycle design, but not ODC parameters.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 硬件和生命周期信息不能替代 ODC。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Hardware and lifecycle information are not substitutes for ODC.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 用于防止把产品可靠性指标误填为运行边界。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Prevents product reliability metrics from being mistaken for operating boundaries.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 多传感器配置 + 遮挡 / 脏污阈值未公开
boundary_combinations.title_en: Multi-sensor suite + undisclosed occlusion / contamination thresholds
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 激光雷达、雷达和摄像头冗余提高感知能力，但公开资料没有说明传感器遮挡、脏污、积雪或降雨导致的退出阈值。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Lidar, radar, and camera redundancy improves perception, but public sources do not state exit thresholds for sensor blockage, contamination, snow, or rain.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: NVIDIA 公开资料披露小马智行平台包含多类传感器和冗余设计；具体 ODC 阈值未公开。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: NVIDIA public material describes multiple sensor types and redundancy; concrete ODC thresholds are not public.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: “传感器多”不等于“恶劣环境边界已公开”。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: “More sensors” does not mean adverse-environment boundaries are disclosed.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 应作为传感器可用性公开缺口。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Should be treated as a sensor-availability disclosure gap.

evidence_refs.title: NVIDIA Blog · Pony.ai DRIVE Orin Robotaxi platform
evidence_refs.section: L4 compute platform, redundant vehicle platform, sensor suite

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 全无人乘客交互 + 语音启程 / HMI
boundary_combinations.title_en: Fully driverless passenger interaction + voice trip start / HMI
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 全无人 Robotaxi 的 ODC 还包括乘客如何确认行程、启动车辆、理解车辆状态和应急沟通。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: A fully driverless robotaxi ODC also includes how passengers confirm the trip, start the vehicle, understand vehicle state, and communicate in abnormal cases.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: Gen-7 官方 PDF 提到 HMI 升级，例如语音启动行程；异常情况下 HMI 细节未披露。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The Gen-7 official PDF mentions HMI upgrades such as voice-activated trip start; abnormal-case HMI details are not disclosed.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: L4 ODC 不只是车外环境，也包括乘客交互条件。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: L4 ODC includes passenger-interaction conditions, not only the outside environment.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 建议未来 L4 Schema 增加服务交互字段。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Future L4 schema work should add service-interaction fields.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 临时交通管制 / 施工 + 运营区域调整
boundary_combinations.title_en: Temporary traffic control / construction + operating-area adjustment
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 临时管制和施工会改变道路可达性，对 L4 服务表现为绕行、暂停派单或 geofence 调整。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Temporary control and construction change road reachability; for L4 service this appears as rerouting, dispatch suspension, or geofence adjustment.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 公开资料披露全无人服务和运营区域，但没有披露临时交通管制下的服务调整规则。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Public sources disclose fully driverless service and operating areas, but not service-adjustment rules under temporary traffic control.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: L4 服务边界会随临时道路状态变化。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: L4 service boundaries can change with temporary road states.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这是需要运营方确认的低置信推定，不能当作官方 ODC。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A low-confidence inference requiring operator confirmation; not an official ODC declaration.

evidence_refs.title: 深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营
evidence_refs.section: 前海核心区域、近 2000 个乘车站点、复杂城市和天气能力表述

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Fully-driverless commercial operations, Gen-7 Robotaxi, ADK lifecycle, HMI

sources: 小马智行官网（中文）: https://pony.ai/?lang=zh
Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF: https://ir.pony.ai/node/7506/pdf
深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营: https://qh.sz.gov.cn/sygnan/qhzx/dtzx/content/mpost_12077869.html
NVIDIA Blog · Pony.ai Gen-7 DRIVE Orin: https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/pony-ai-robotaxi-fleet-drive-orin/
metadata.notes: OpenODC 社区已按 2026-05-13 可访问的小马智行官网、IR 官方 PDF、深圳前海政府页面和硬件合作方资料复核。本条可高置信支撑 Gen-7 全无人商业化运营城市、L4 Robotaxi 服务属性、车内无安全员、硬件/算力方向；具体 geofence、速度上限、天气停运阈值、乘客规则和远程协助 SOP 未公开。
